calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Homan Mobasser, Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Centerone Financial Services, LLC, Assignee of U.S. Bank National Association as Owner Trustee for Me.
Witness Ric Richardson, Sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Defendant Terrie Amanda Kyer, Sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant Ronnie G. Barnett, aka, Ronnie Gribbs Barnett - Default on file.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants Ronnie G. Barnett, aka, Ronnie Gribbs Barnett, and Terrie A. Kyer for Judgment as follows:

Owing Balance of $15,287.23
Plaintiff waives interest as to both defendants.
Costs $1983.80
Attorney's Fees $1,285.00 for a Total of $18,556.03
Plaintiff entitled to immediate possession of Motor Vehicle Mitsubishi Eclipse, 2007, VIN 4A3AL25F37E016949.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a form of Judgment within five days.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Centerone Financial Services Llc 'S Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Text Ruling
